# ShipSwift Component MCP

Paid remote MCP for ShipSwift, structured receipts, usage logs, and audit-ready JSON evidence.

Website: https://shipswiftcomponents.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://shipswiftcomponents.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://shipswiftcomponents.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/shipswift-component-mcp-mcp

Use case: ShipSwift Component MCP remote MCP for ShipSwift.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: search_swiftui_component, generate_component_patch, validate_dependency_policy, export_component_receipt
